nodes.name: GET — Show Informed Consent Form
nodes.notes: QR code / link points to this URL. When the browser sends a GET request, n8n returns the consent HTML page.

nodes.name: GET Response — Show HTML
nodes.notes: Paste the entire content of informedconsent.html into the Response Body field.

nodes.name: POST — Consent Has Been Given
nodes.notes: The confirm button in informedconsent.html sends a POST request here with { consent: true, ts: ... }.

nodes.name: POST Response — Return redirectUrl
nodes.notes: Returns JSON { redirectUrl, participantId } to informedconsent.html, which then redirects the participant.
